files.README.md:
# {{project_name}}

{{description}}

## Features
- Pure vanilla JavaScript - no dependencies!
- HTML5 Canvas with smooth 60 FPS gameplay
- Different enemy types (Basic, Fast, Tank)
- Power-ups (Health, Triple Shot, Rapid Fire)
- Wave-based difficulty progression
- Particle explosion effects
- Score and health system
- Retro neon visual style

## How to Play

Simply open `index.html` in any modern web browser!

```bash
# Quick start
open index.html

# Or with a local server
npx serve .
```

## Controls

- **WASD** or **Arrow Keys**: Move ship
- **Space**: Shoot
- **R**: Restart (after game over)

## Enemy Types

- **Red Squares (Basic)**: Standard enemies, 10 points
- **Orange Diamonds (Fast)**: Quick, zig-zag movement, 30 points
- **Purple Hexagons (Tank)**: High health, slow, 50 points

## Power-ups

- **Green (+)**: Restore 30 health
- **Yellow (3)**: Triple shot for 10 seconds
- **Magenta (R)**: Rapid fire for 5 seconds

## Project Structure

```
├── index.html          # Main page
└── js/
    ├── main.js         # Entry point
    ├── Game.js         # Main game logic
    ├── Player.js       # Player ship
    ├── Bullet.js       # Projectiles
    ├── Enemy.js        # Enemy types
    ├── PowerUp.js      # Power-up items
    ├── Particle.js     # Explosion effects
    └── Input.js        # Keyboard handling
```

## Game Mechanics

### Waves
Difficulty increases every 10 seconds:
- Enemy spawn rate increases
- More enemy variety
- Higher scores

### Scoring
- Basic Enemy: 10 points
- Fast Enemy: 30 points
- Tank Enemy: 50 points
- Bonus for surviving waves

## Extension Points

### Add Boss Battles
Create a Boss class that appears every 5 waves.

### Add Weapon Upgrades
Allow player to collect different weapon types.

### Add Shield System
Implement a shield that absorbs one hit.

### Add Leaderboard
Use localStorage to save high scores.

## Browser Support
- Chrome/Edge 60+
- Firefox 55+
- Safari 12+
- Mobile browsers (touch controls would need to be added)
